drafts.subject1: Summit Therapeutics — MIDD & Clinical Pharmacology Support
drafts.email1:
Hi H,

I came across your Oncology programme, and wanted to reach out.

Model-Informed Drug Development is increasingly expected by FDA and EMA reviewers — and programmes that build MIDD into their clinical strategy from the start consistently reach decision points faster with fewer surprises.

At PumasAI, we partner with clinical development teams to deliver model-informed drug development, clinical pharmacology, and regulatory strategy. Our scientists are pharmacometricians and clinical pharmacologists — former Pfizer, FDA, and academia — and we work end-to-end from model development through regulatory submission.

Across your 4-country footprint, regulatory-ready PK/PD packages are a recurring need — something we handle routinely.

Would a 20-minute call be worthwhile to see if there's a fit? Happy to share a brief case study relevant to your programme first.

Best,
[Your Name]
PumasAI | www.pumas.ai
drafts.subject2: Re: Summit Therapeutics — MIDD & Clinical Pharmacology Support
drafts.fu1:
Hi H,

Wanted to follow up briefly on my previous note.

Many teams we work with find that proactive MIDD strategy reduces overall development time and strengthens regulatory interactions. Happy to share a relevant example for your programme.

We recently supported a clinical development programme with PK/PD modelling that supported a key regulatory decision, reducing back-and-forth with FDA by several months — I'd be glad to share a short summary if it would be useful context for your team.

No commitment — just a conversation to see if the timing makes sense for Summit Therapeutics.

Still interested in a quick call?

Best,
[Your Name]
PumasAI | www.pumas.ai
drafts.fu2:
Hi H,

I know inboxes get busy — this will be my last note on this.

If a pharmacometrics or clinical pharmacology need comes up at any stage, please feel free to reach out.

If the timing isn't right now, I completely understand. Feel free to reach out whenever it makes sense — we're happy to help at any stage of development.

Wishing your team every success with the programme.
